purpose: Correct the JRA display/rank policy after PR-181 by restoring the PR-132 rank boundary: B+ is first_race_time plus last_race_time only; A is race-by-race schedule or racecard detail.

rank_policy_summary.C: meeting_date plus racecourse confirmed, time unknown
rank_policy_summary.B+: first_race_time plus last_race_time captured; last_race_time is the final race start time, not meeting_end_time
rank_policy_summary.A: race-by-race schedule or racecard detail captured

source_of_truth.monthly_display_policy: one row per meeting; A-rank races are not expanded into the monthly page and belong on meeting detail pages

correction.wrong_policy_to_remove: Do not require complete race_number/race_time rows for B+.
correction.correct_policy: B+ requires first_race_time and last_race_time. Race-by-race rows make the record A-candidate data, not B+ display data.
correction.display_principle: Monthly calendar always renders meeting summaries, never per-race expansion.

rank_display_contract.day_page: meeting summary with first_race_time and last_race_time; race_count may be shown if it is source-derived from verified rows, but race-by-race display is not required for B+
meeting summary plus detail link; race-by-race schedule belongs on the meeting detail page

jra_implication.current_verified_page_rows: The JRA calendar pages expose page-level race rows. Those rows are useful for deriving B+ summaries after section split. They should not force monthly race-row expansion.
jra_implication.section_split_goal: Split each calendar page into official meeting sections, then derive meeting summaries. If race-by-race rows remain available per section, mark the record as A-capable and route rows to detail pages.
jra_implication.bplus_goal: For each split meeting, store first_race_time and last_race_time summary fields.
jra_implication.a_goal: For each split meeting with race-by-race rows or racecard detail links, store A detail data separately from monthly summary rows.

required_next_changes: Update PR-181-derived planning in later files so B+ no longer requires complete race-by-race rows.
Add CI guard that fails if B+ is described as race-by-race schedule or racecard detail.
Add CI guard that fails if A race rows are expanded in the monthly calendar.
Keep monthly calendar one row per meeting for C, B, B+, and A.
Route A race-by-race content to meeting detail pages only.
